message:
fix: add Cmd::SetMouseCapture + clippy fixes + snapshot updates

- Add SetMouseCapture(bool) variant to Cmd enum in ftui-runtime
  with constructor, Debug, type_name, and execute_cmd handler (no-op
  until TerminalSession gains set_mouse_capture method)
- Add CmdRecord::MouseCapture to simulator for test observability
- Fix clippy field_reassign_with_default in list.rs and table.rs tests
- Fix VS16 (U+FE0F) in admonition icons causing terminal width mismatch
- Bless snapshot updates for help overlay content changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
